quicksight.dataset.ingestionwaitpolicy.I.Docs: The maximum time (in hours) to wait for Ingestion to complete. Default timeout is 36 hours. Applicable only when `DataSetImportMode` mode is set to SPICE and `WaitForSpiceIngestion` is set to true.

quicksight.dataset.ingestionwaitpolicy.W.Docs: Wait for SPICE ingestion to finish to mark dataset creation or update as successful. Default (true). Applicable only when `DataSetImportMode` mode is set to SPICE.
